name: income_generation_ideas
description: Generate ideas for income generation based on capabilities
template:
Based on the following capabilities:

{capabilities}

And available tools:

{tools}

Propose 3 ways to generate income or provide value.

Format:
1. [Idea] - [Implementation] - [Potential Value: $X]
2. [Idea] - [Implementation] - [Potential Value: $X]
3. [Idea] - [Implementation] - [Potential Value: $X]
system_prompt: You are a business strategist. Propose practical income generation ideas.
